name: Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomato juice, garlic, and chopped onions in a saucepan.
2. Bring to simmer.
3. Add oregano, cumin, green chilies, minced garlic, basil, chili powder, and coriander.
4. Continue to simmer for 1 hour.
5. Cut fillets into 4-ounce servings and place in a baking dish.
6. Add vegetable pieces (celery, bell pepper, and zucchini) to the fish.
7. Cover with sauce.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes.
9. Garnish with parsley and lemon.
Serves 6; 190 calories.
One hour of leisurely gardening burns 240 calories.
